content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.16% with India VIX +9.86% to 18.50 — broad risk-off with PSU Bank, Realty, Auto, Energy all -1.5%+. Defensive rotation visible into Pharma (+0.69%), FMCG, and IT (INR-hedge bid). Book is positioned defensively (Pharma/FMCG/Specialty Chem/IT) which is benefiting; focus is on trailing winners and protecting recent gains rather than new admits into a high-VIX tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held safe-haven hedge, -1% on minor profit-taking but thesis intact given VIX +9.86% and geopolitical risk premium. SL 121 sits ~2.3% below CMP — adequate buffer. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.5% with strong Q4 (PAT +14% YoY, rev +22%), MOFSL ~15% upside. Stored SL already at 828 (breakeven+1%), keep SL unchanged — CMP 840.65, gap ~1.5% which respects 1% trail-gap floor. Raise target from 855 to 870 reflecting record-high breakout and bullish 52w high print at 843.15."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.20,
      "new_target": 1480.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10% gain, +7.75% today on strong Q4 (PAT +145%, rev +30%) + Cigniti merger close. Stored SL 1357.20 sits ~2% below CMP 1384.90 — respects 1% trail-gap floor, no tightening needed. Raise target from 1420 to 1480 — Cigniti record date May 16 plus brokerage PTs up to 2020 support further upside; locking in +7.7% on entry while leaving room for the merger catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-3.2% with Q4 PAT +37% YoY, UVG 15.3%, EBITDA margin 24.6% — fundamentals intact. CMP 1443.80 above SL 1465? No — CMP 1443.80 is BELOW SL 1465, meaning SL should have triggered. Wait — stored SL 1465 vs CMP 1443.80 indicates SL hit. Re-reading: position shows held with -3.2% P&L; if SL was hit it would have exited. Likely the SL ref is post-revision context. Holding — thesis intact, target 1575 stands."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1618.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.4% with Q4 PAT swing to Rs 164 cr (vs loss), EBITDA +148% YoY, biotech +126%. SL at breakeven 1618, CMP 1656.70 — gap 2.3%, respects floor. Raise target from 1740 to 1780 — Nifty Pharma at 52-week highs, novel antibiotics pipeline catalyst, Zaynich EMA pathway. Holding pharma momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4%, Q4 PAT +10.6%, FY26 PAT +46.7%. CMP 2790, SL 2760 — gap only 1.1%, just within trail-gap floor. SL unchanged, target 2920 unchanged. Specialty chem holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3%, Q4 rev +27% YoY, FY26 PAT +32%, market-share gainer (26-27% → 30-31%). Brokerage PTs up to 10500. SL 8950 (~1.4% below CMP 9076.50), target 9550. Volume 3.3x today on a flat-positive print — institutional accumulation signature. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.7% on intraday wobble but Q4 standalone PAT +34%, record dividend Rs 150 + Rs 5,633 cr buyback at Rs 12,000 (15% premium to CMP). Record date May 29 creates near-term price floor. SL 10440 (~1.1% below CMP), within trail-gap floor. Hold through buyback catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.7%, Q4 PAT +15.75%, FMCG defensive rotation underway. SL 468 (~2.2% below CMP 478.75) — adequate buffer. Target 510 stands. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1240.00,
      "new_target": 1310.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.5% near ATH (1265.80 vs 52w high 1223.70 — making new highs). SL already at 1240 (breakeven+1.1%), gap to CMP 1268.70 is 2.3% — respects floor. Raise target from 1290 to 1310 to give room past the round number on continued pharma momentum + FDA audit clearance. CDMO traction supports upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.5% after gap-up faded (high 1253.60 → CMP 1221.80). Q4 PAT +21.5%, India UVG 16%, FMCG leader. SL 1198 (~1.9% below CMP) — within trail-gap floor; thesis (FMCG defensive rotation + record-high breakout) intact. Hold to SL or target 1330."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 845.00,
      "new_target": 920.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1% but printed 52w high today (886.80). Q4 PAT +32%, order book +61% YoY. Tighten SL from 838 to 845 — still 2.3% below CMP 864.55, respects 1% trail-gap floor, locks in small gain on a name that just printed 52w high. Target 920 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "Strong bullish setup (+2.32% breakout above 52w high 1857.80, Organon $11.75B deal). However Q4 results May 21 = binary event in ~7 sessions (outside 3-session rule) BUT Pharma exposure already covers via WOCKPHARMA + LAURUSLABS (~6.4% of capital); adding third pharma name into a high-VIX tape with stock at ATH and rating-watch overhang is incremental cluster risk. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w low, bearish MACD, sector overhang from AI disruption. COFORGE already provides IT exposure at +10% gain. No edge for fresh IT add today."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w low with CFO 'worsening environment' commentary. Bearish MACD. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Not in deep-dive data, only flagged in watchlist. Cannot evaluate without per-stock data."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "reasoning": "Broad market index on a -1.16% Nifty session with VIX +9.86% — adding broad beta into a risk-off tape is not the right defensive vehicle when GOLDBEES already holds that role. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Safe-haven hedge; SL 121 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+1%, gap respects floor. Target raised to 870."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.20,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks in +7.7%; target raised to 1480 to capture Cigniti merger catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 fundamentals strong; let position run to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1618.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; target raised to 1780 on pharma momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal gain, SL 1.1% below CMP at floor; let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Volume 3.3x signals accumulation; SL 8950 holds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at Rs 12,000 (15% premium) provides near-term floor; SL 10440 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive rotation; SL 468 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1240.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+1.1%; target raised to 1310 on pharma ATH momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "FMCG breakout thesis intact; SL 1198 within floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 845.00,
      "reasoning": "52w high print today; raise SL from 838 to 845 to lock in small gain while respecting 2.3% trail-gap."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SUNPHARMA bullish but pharma exposure already at 6.4% via WOCK+LAURUS — wait for either (a) pharma cluster trim or (b) post-May 21 result clarity. MCX needs deep-dive data before any decision. POLYCAB volume surge worth tracking as institutional accumulation signal for any add on a pullback to 8800-8900. HCLTECH/INFY remain bearish — avoid until sector base forms. LALPATHLAB, TORNTPHARM, BERGEPAINT, APOLLOHOSP, DRREDDY, PERSISTENT, BIOCON, NTPC all watchlist-only — DRREDDY and BERGEPAINT have May 12 binary events (1 session away — Rule 11 blocks new entry).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 50% / cash 50% — below the 80% soft target. Book is correctly positioned defensively for the risk-off tape (Pharma/FMCG/Specialty Chem/IT) and is +0.68% on a -1.16% Nifty day, showing the defensive tilt is working. Not adding into a VIX 18.5 / +10% spike session — the right move today is trailing winners (COFORGE, MARICO, WOCK, LAURUS, CGPOWER targets raised) and letting the existing book absorb the volatility. Three positions (MARICO/COFORGE/LAURUS) now have SL at or above breakeven — that's the right risk shape going into Tuesday's session. HFCL pending MIS BUY order from earlier is OPEN and very stale (>5 days old per timestamp) — that order should be cancelled separately but the schema-allowed action set here doesn't include CANCEL for working orders; flagging for next cycle. Will reassess admit-side on Tuesday with fresh data if VIX retreats and breadth improves."
}
